M-070.NAME: matrix-visual-runtime
M-070.owns: Shared React/Vite Matrix canvas runtime and CRT overlay mount points for the user frontend and admin frontend.

reference.source-1: TRUFFLEX matrix-background.js Matrix rain loop, resize behavior, pointer influence, and reduced-motion static fallback.
reference.source-2: TRUFFLEX style-system scanline, flicker, glitch, and matrix fade effects adapted to KrotPN operational screens.

public-interfaces.interface-1: MatrixBackground React component renders a fixed, pointer-events-none canvas layer.
public-interfaces.interface-2: VisualShell React component mounts MatrixBackground, scanline overlay, and app content with safe z-index boundaries.
public-interfaces.interface-3: useMatrixMotionPolicy helper applies prefers-reduced-motion, tab visibility, resize, and canvas context guards.

constraints.constraint-1: Do not change backend APIs, auth flows, billing logic, VPN provisioning, MTProto provisioning, deploy scripts, install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, or runtime topology.
constraints.constraint-2: Canvas failures must degrade to a readable static background without uncaught exceptions.
constraints.constraint-3: Animations must stop or simplify under prefers-reduced-motion and inactive-tab conditions.
constraints.constraint-4: Do not import TRUFFLEX music, NFT content, spider physics, fluid cursor, or WebGL glow unless a later phase explicitly approves it.
constraints.constraint-5: Canvas and overlay layers must never intercept clicks, focus, keyboard navigation, or mobile scroll gestures.

acceptance.metric-1: Desktop and mobile screenshots prove the Matrix canvas is nonblank while content remains readable.
acceptance.metric-2: Reduced-motion screenshot proves a static readable fallback instead of a running animation loop.
acceptance.metric-3: Frontend and frontend-admin builds pass with no deploy/install diff.
acceptance.metric-4: Runtime smoke verifies no console errors from canvas init, resize, teardown, or missing context branches.

crosslinks.phase-52: Matrix runtime foundation and shared shell integration.
crosslinks.phase-53: User cabinet Matrix redesign uses this runtime.
crosslinks.phase-54: Admin console Matrix redesign uses this runtime.
